companies.name: Motorq
companies.notes: PPO only. Requires intern at Motorq.

companies.name: Google
rounds: Online Assessment (2-3 LC Hard problems, 90 min)
companies.notes: Hardest OA in the season. LC Hard expected. Practice Blind 75 + NeetCode 150.

companies.name: Microsoft
companies.notes: Focus on clean code and thought process over just getting the answer.

companies.name: DE Shaw
companies.notes: Known for tough aptitude and quant-leaning OA. CGPA cutoff enforced strictly.

companies.name: Amazon
companies.notes: Know all 16 Amazon Leadership Principles. Behavioural questions are mandatory every round.

companies.name: Okta
companies.notes: Identity & access management company.

companies.name: Moveworks
companies.notes: AI-first company. ML/NLP background is a plus.

companies.name: Media.net
companies.notes: Strong focus on CS fundamentals alongside DSA.

companies.name: Rubrik
companies.notes: Strong distributed systems focus. Good for those interested in storage/cloud.

companies.name: Commvault
companies.notes: Data protection/cloud company.

companies.name: Cisco (Hardware)
companies.notes: Hardware-specific role, different from Cisco SWE.

companies.name: Couchbase
companies.notes: NoSQL database company.

companies.name: Synopsys
companies.notes: EDA tools company. Relevant for VLSI/chip design interest.

companies.name: NXP Semiconductors
companies.notes: Semiconductor company. Very relevant for robotics students.

companies.name: Walmart
companies.notes: PPO based.

companies.name: Human Resocia
companies.notes: Japan-based role. Requires relocation.

companies.name: Meesho
companies.notes: BA role, not SDE.

companies.name: Saviynt
companies.notes: Cloud security company.

companies.name: JP Morgan Chase
companies.notes: Large recruiter. Finance domain knowledge helpful.

companies.name: Oracle PPO
companies.notes: Strong focus on DBMS and OS in interviews.

companies.name: Sabre
companies.notes: Travel technology company.

companies.name: BlackRock
companies.notes: World's largest asset manager. Finance background helps.

companies.name: Databricks
rounds: Technical Round 2 (System Design for data systems)
companies.notes: Data & AI platform. ML/data background helpful.

companies.name: Nutanix
companies.notes: Cloud computing/HCI company. Strong OS and networking focus.

companies.name: Bain Capability Network
companies.notes: Consulting. Case prep is essential (Bain cases).

companies.name: ZS Associates
companies.notes: Consulting + analytics firm. Case study prep important.

companies.name: Futures First
companies.notes: Prop trading firm. Not tech-focused. Good quant/math skills needed.

companies.name: Accenture
companies.notes: Mass recruiter. Useful as a safety net.

companies.name: Hyperverge
companies.notes: AI-powered identity verification startup.

companies.name: Apple
companies.notes: Internship only. Very selective.

companies.name: Goldman Sachs
companies.notes: CTC appears low but prestige + bonuses are significant. Quant-heavy process.

companies.name: PwC
companies.notes: Big 4. Good brand name.

companies.name: Deloitte
companies.notes: Largest recruiter. Mass hiring. Good for getting first offer while targeting higher.

companies.name: Prodapt
companies.notes: Based in Chennai. Good entry-level option.

companies.name: KPMG
companies.notes: Big 4 consulting.

companies.name: Infosys
companies.notes: Base salary is low. Specialist/SE tracks pay more. Good safety net.

companies.name: TCS
rounds: TCS NQT (National Qualifier Test - aptitude + coding)
companies.notes: Mass recruiter. Prime/Digital tracks pay more. TCS NQT prep recommended.

companies.name: Qualcomm
rounds: Technical Round 1 (DSP / VLSI / Embedded depending on track)
companies.notes: Strong for ECE/EEE. CSE eligible for software track.

companies.name: Adobe
companies.notes: PPO from intern. Known for strong LLD focus.
